creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Hi Daniel,

Daniel Boggasch wrote on 17.05.2013 17:28:
> ===>  Building for fusefs-exfat-1.0.0
> env: python2: No such file or directory
> *** [do-build] Error code 127
>
> Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/fusefs-exfat.
>
> root@nexus:/usr/ports # which python2
> python2: Command not found.

Looks like something with your particular system, because I can't 
reproduce this both with clean install, and after python upgrade 2.7.3 
-> 2.7.5. I have python2 symlink in both cases. Did you do something 
with PYTHON_DEFAULT_VERSION in make.conf or something?

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
